name: proof
description: GitHub Action that verifies pull requests actually fix what they claim to fix

scripts.run:local: GITHUB_EVENT_PATH=test/mock-pr.json INPUT_GITHUB_TOKEN=test INPUT_RUN_TESTS=true INPUT_CHECK_ISSUE=true INPUT_DETECT_HALLUCINATIONS=true INPUT_BLOCK_MERGE=false node src/index.js
scripts.run:dist: GITHUB_EVENT_PATH=test/mock-pr.json INPUT_GITHUB_TOKEN=test INPUT_RUN_TESTS=false INPUT_CHECK_ISSUE=true INPUT_DETECT_HALLUCINATIONS=true INPUT_BLOCK_MERGE=false node dist/index.js
